_meta.title: Chart family BUILD (M1 component wave -> catalog wave -> M2 exemplar wave) — the execution plan the chart-family SPEC/LLD are authored against
_meta.author: system-planner
_meta.grounding: PRD chart-family.prd.md (PRD-G1/G2/G3) · ADR-0107 (accepted; clauses 1-8 + forks F1-F3 as recommended) · the intake decomp chart-family-intake.decomp.json (M0 records only — this manifest adds the build plane it deliberately did not cover) · fleet gates verified against the tree: file-set.test.ts, family-coherence.test.ts, descriptor/site-coverage.test.ts (per-tier page law + the hard-coded display-tier membership list at line 163), catalog/default/index.test.ts (SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate)
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently: OUTSIDE-IN from the wave/slice structure the fleet's build discipline imposes (pure math -> control folder -> serial integration -> site pages -> catalog rows -> exemplar), sliced for fan-out (one writer per file; every shared/barrel edit in ONE serial integration slice). INSIDE-OUT from what the charts must DO (normalize, paint, announce, diverge from zero, survive WHCM/RTL, stay catalog-reachable, teach the idiom, keep fleet gates green) — enumerated from ADR-0107's clauses + the standing laws (ADR-0102, ADR-0057, geometry.md Display class, test-the-whole-shape), not read off the node tree.

nodes.label: sparkline pure-math module (controls/sparkline/sparkline-math.ts, DOM-free)
nodes.accept: sparkline-math.test.ts (jsdom-free unit) covers empty / single point / all-equal / negative / NaN-and-non-finite inputs against the frozen sparklineGeometry signature; `npm test` green on the file

nodes.label: ui-sparkline control folder (sparkline.ts/.css/.md + jsdom & browser tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/sparkline/ ({sparkline.ts,.css,.md} + >=1 test); a11y probe asserts internals.role=img + the generated summary string (incl. the empty/single-point degenerate wordings); whole-shape browser leg (Chromium+WebKit) asserts a bare <ui-sparkline values=...> in a flex row paints a non-collapsed box >= the token floor

nodes.label: bar-chart pure-math module (controls/bar-chart/bar-math.ts, DOM-free)
nodes.accept: bar-math.test.ts covers diverging negative values (zero-baseline start/length percentages), all-equal, all-zero (zero span), empty, and non-finite-entry dropping against the frozen barRows signature; `npm test` green on the file

nodes.label: ui-bar-chart control folder (bar-chart.ts/.css/.md + jsdom & browser tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/bar-chart/; a11y probe asserts internals.role=list + one role=listitem row per datum announcing label+printed value with the visual bar aria-hidden; browser legs (both engines) assert proportional fill widths (within epsilon of the math), the RTL flip of rows, and the forced-colors block keeps bars visible

nodes.label: serial integration slice (controls/index.ts barrel · component-styles.css import · site-coverage display-tier membership edit · size report)
nodes.accept: `npm run check && npm test` green repo-wide (family-coherence C1/C3 prove barrel export + styles import; site-coverage.test.ts line-163 display-tier list updated to include bar-chart+sparkline); `npm run size` run by hand and reported, with the ADR-0049 family-budget re-base recorded as its own note if exceeded

nodes.label: site doc pages (site/sparkline-doc.html + site/bar-chart-doc.html + nav/toc rows)
nodes.accept: site-coverage per-tier page gate green for both new display-tier descriptors ({name}-doc.html present); site toc/nav drift gates green; both pages render the live controls in the built site

nodes.label: M1 catalog wave (same wave as the descriptors — SPEC-N2)
default-catalog rows + factories (catalog.json Sparkline/BarChart · factories.ts · gate tests)
nodes.accept: catalog.json declares Sparkline+BarChart per the chart-family SPEC row contract; both factory-bound (display-only, no value mark); factories.test.ts + catalog/default/index.test.ts fleet-derived gate green with EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST residue none; a payload using both types validates 0 CATALOG errors through validateA2ui

nodes.label: catalog SPEC repair (a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 rows + the when-to-use guidance note)
nodes.accept: a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 carries the Sparkline and BarChart rows + the tile/Sparkline/BarChart/List-table usage-guidance note (ADR-0087 Fork-A style) in the same change as the rows; `python /Users/kimba/.claude/skills/spec-author/scripts/harness_checks.py spec <catalog spec>` still exits 0

nodes.label: report-card exemplar seed (Card+Text+Sparkline+BarChart; joins allSeeds)
nodes.accept: the seed exists in the examples module and allSeeds; validates 0 CATALOG errors through validateA2ui; renders in the examples/gallery surface (browser-verified); its promptText exercises the trend + breakdown asks the stats-grid seed cannot serve

nodes.label: corpus + derived-prompt re-validation over the widened catalog
nodes.accept: the corpus admission gate and the derived-prompt/coverage gates re-run green with the two new types in the catalog (the ADR-0087 consequence pattern); any shard/prompt drift is repaired in the same change

actions.label: normalize a numeric series to renderable geometry, with every degenerate input (empty/single/all-equal/negative/non-finite) handled deterministically
paint the series mark crisply at any box size, inheriting fleet ink and surviving forced-colors
announce the sparkline to AT — role=img with the generated summary; no silent state
compute magnitude bars from a zero baseline (diverging for negatives), dropping non-finite entries
render label|bar|value rows as real, wrapping, direction-aware DOM text with length-proportional fills
announce the bar chart to AT as a list — one item per datum, the printed value as the accessible datum
join the fleet lifecycle: barrel export, styles import, descriptor trip-wires, size budget
document the new controls under the site per-tier page law
make charts catalog-reachable and validator-clean the same wave the descriptors land (SPEC-N2)
keep the owning catalog SPEC true — §5.2 rows + the when-to-use guidance in the same change
teach models the report idiom by exemplar (when a chart beats a tile)
re-validate the teaching surfaces (corpus, derived prompt) over the widened catalog

edges.why: the control renders exactly the geometry the frozen math signature pins — the polyline/area strings and the summary facts are the math module's outputs
the row renderer consumes the frozen barRows output (start/length percentages, dropped-entry count) — it cannot be coded against a guess
the serial integration slice edits the shared barrel/styles files to export what the sparkline folder ships — the folder must exist first (one-writer-per-file fan-out law)
same shared-file dependency for the bar-chart folder — both folders land before the ONE serial writer touches controls/index.ts and component-styles.css
the doc pages mount the barrel-exported, style-imported controls; before the integration slice the site build cannot resolve them
the SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate walks shipped descriptors (tag -> PascalCase) — the catalog rows are validated against descriptors that exist and are integrated, in the same wave (ADR-0107 clause 6)
the §5.2 row cites landed facts (factory binding, no value mark, prop cells) — the doc repair records the shipped rows, not intentions
the exemplar must validate 0-CATALOG against the widened catalog — the Sparkline/BarChart rows must be declared before the seed can pass admission
the corpus/prompt re-validation covers the new exemplar too — it runs after the seed joins allSeeds so one pass proves the whole widened surface
